allow: Bash(mysql -u Inna -pLadyamy89 characters -e "SELECT ca.guid, c.name, c.race, c.class, COUNT\(ca.achievement\) as ach_count FROM character_achievement ca JOIN characters c ON ca.guid=c.guid GROUP BY ca.guid, c.name, c.race, c.class ORDER BY ach_count DESC LIMIT 5;")
Bash(mysql -u Inna -pLadyamy89 world -e "SELECT ID, points FROM achievement_dbc WHERE ID IN \(6,7,8,9,10,11,12,13,891,889,2078\) ORDER BY ID;")
Bash(mysql -u Inna -pLadyamy89 world -e "SELECT SUM\(a.points\), COUNT\(*\) FROM achievement_dbc a JOIN characters.character_achievement ca ON a.ID=ca.achievement WHERE ca.guid=1;")
Bash(mysql -u Inna -pLadyamy89 world -e "SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM achievement_dbc;")
Bash(mysql -u Inna -pLadyamy89 world -e "SELECT ID, points FROM achievement_dbc LIMIT 10;")
Bash(mysql -u Inna -pLadyamy89 world -e "SELECT DISTINCT points FROM achievement_dbc ORDER BY points DESC LIMIT 10;")
Bash(mysql -u Inna -pLadyamy89 world -e "SELECT ID FROM achievement_dbc WHERE points > 0 LIMIT 5;")
